properties.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignments a JOIN enrollments e ON a.course_id = e.course_id WHERE a.id = ? AND e.user_id = ?
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignment_submissions WHERE assignment_id = ? AND student_id = ?
INSERT INTO assignment_submissions ( assignment_id, student_id, content_title, submitted_at ) VALUES ( ?, ?, ?, NOW() )
UPDATE assignment_submissions SET content_title = ?, submitted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE assignment_id = ? AND student_id = ?
DELETE FROM assignment_submissions WHERE assignment_id = ? AND student_id = ?

SELECT a.id, a.course_id, c.title AS course_title, a.title, a.description, a.deadline, CASE WHEN s.id IS NOT NULL THEN '제출 완료' ELSE '미제출' END AS submission_status, s.content_title AS submission_content, s.submitted_at FROM assignments a JOIN courses c ON a.course_id = c.id JOIN enrollments e ON e.course_id = c.id LEFT JOIN assignment_submissions s ON s.assignment_id = a.id AND s.student_id = e.user_id WHERE e.user_id = ? ORDER BY c.title, a.deadline;

SELECT a.id AS assignment_id, a.course_id, c.title AS course_title, a.title AS assignment_title, a.description, a.deadline FROM assignments a JOIN courses c ON a.course_id = c.id WHERE c.professor_id = ? ORDER BY a.deadline ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignments a JOIN courses c ON a.course_id = c.id WHERE a.id = ? AND c.professor_id = ?

SELECT u.id AS student_id, u.name AS student_name, CASE WHEN s.id IS NOT NULL THEN '제출 완료' ELSE '미제출' END AS submission_status, s.content_title AS content_title, s.submitted_at FROM assignments a JOIN courses c ON a.course_id = c.id JOIN enrollments e ON e.course_id = c.id JOIN users u ON u.id = e.user_id LEFT JOIN assignment_submissions s ON s.assignment_id = a.id AND s.student_id = u.id WHERE a.id = ? AND c.professor_id = ? AND u.user_type = 'STUDENT' ORDER BY u.id;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM courses WHERE id = ? AND professor_id = ?
INSERT INTO assignments ( course_id, title, description, deadline ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignments WHERE course_id = ?
UPDATE assignments a JOIN courses c ON a.course_id = c.id SET a.title = ?, a.description = ?, a.deadline = ? WHERE a.id = ? AND c.professor_id = ?
DELETE FROM assignment_submissions WHERE assignment_id = ?
DELETE a FROM assignments a JOIN courses c ON a.course_id = c.id WHERE a.id = ? AND c.professor_id = ?
SELECT c.id AS course_id, c.title AS course_title FROM courses c WHERE c.professor_id = ? ORDER BY c.title ASC
SELECT submitted_at FROM assignment_submissions WHERE assignment_id = ? AND student_id = ?
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignment_submissions WHERE assignment_id = ? AND ( submitted_at < ? OR ( submitted_at = ? AND student_id < ? ) )
SELECT c.id AS course_id, c.title AS course_title FROM enrollments e JOIN courses c ON e.course_id = c.id WHERE e.user_id = ? ORDER BY c.title ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM enrollments e JOIN assignments a ON e.course_id = a.course_id WHERE a.id = ?
SELECT id, category, tag_name, description FROM heart_tags ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT u.id, u.name FROM team_members tm JOIN users u ON tm.student_id = u.id WHERE tm.team_id = ( SELECT team_id FROM team_members WHERE student_id = ? AND team_id IN (SELECT id FROM teams WHERE team_assignment_id = ?) LIMIT 1 ) AND u.id != ?
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM peer_reviews WHERE team_assignment_id = ? AND reviewer_id = ? AND reviewee_id = ?
INSERT INTO peer_reviews (team_assignment_id, reviewer_id, reviewee_id) VALUES (?, ?, ?)
INSERT INTO peer_review_tags (review_id, tag_id) VALUES (?, ?)

SELECT ta.id AS team_assignment_id, c.title AS course_title, ta.title AS assignment_title, ta.deadline FROM team_assignments ta JOIN courses c ON ta.course_id = c.id JOIN teams t ON ta.id = t.team_assignment_id JOIN team_members tm ON t.id = tm.team_id WHERE tm.student_id = ? ORDER BY c.title, ta.deadline
